overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a dystopian urban district at dusk. The player moves from a curved elevated walkway past modern ruins and construction cranes, through muddy industrial zones, and finally passes under a large yellow 'BARGHEST' gate into a fortified settlement area. The environment features wet asphalt, neon signage, unfinished skyscrapers, and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated curved walkway near modern ruins

agents.ego_description: walking along a curved elevated path, approaching a descent to street level

entered.detail: large geodesic dome structure visible in the distance against the sky
modern cylindrical building with reflective glass facade and neon signage
tall palm trees lining the right side of the path
curved concrete barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated curved walkway at dusk, with a distinctive spherical stadium structure visible in the distance. The camera moves forward along wet asphalt, passing a modern curved glass building with neon accents on the left and palm trees on the right, approaching a descent to street level.

events.description: descends from elevated walkway and turns left into open industrial construction area
crosses from paved sidewalk onto dirt and debris-covered ground

agents.ego_description: turning left and descending to street level, crossing toward an industrial construction zone

entered.detail: multiple large construction cranes towering over unfinished buildings
tall building under construction with exposed framework and scaffolding
metal scaffolding structures attached to building facades
red and white striped construction barricade blocking off areas

segments.scene_description: The camera descends from the elevated path and turns left into a wide-open industrial construction zone. The spherical structure and modern building fall behind as the view opens to reveal towering construction cranes and an unfinished skyscraper. The ground transitions from concrete sidewalk to dirt and debris as the camera approaches construction barricades.

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from right to left

agents.ego_description: navigating through muddy construction terrain toward a distant barricade with NPCs ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the muddy path toward the barricade

entered.detail: large yellow industrial gate structure with 'BARGHEST' signage spanning the road ahead
large overhead industrial pipes and conduits running between buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking through a muddy construction thoroughfare with debris scattered about, the camera follows a pedestrian ahead toward a distant yellow gate. The environment is dimly lit with industrial pipes overhead. At the end of the segment, a flying vehicle passes overhead, and the 'BARGHEST' gate becomes clearly visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified industrial entry with overhead gantries

events.description: approaching and entering the covered area under the Barghest gate structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the fortified Barghest gate, moving toward the entrance with other pedestrians nearby

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking through the gate ahead of the camera

entered.detail: yellow vertical banners with black symbols attached to barriers
heavy metal overhead gantry structure supporting the gate
makeshift stalls and containers set up along the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an increasingly enclosed industrial corridor toward the yellow Barghest gate. Overhead metal gantries and pipes dominate the sky view, while yellow banners and makeshift market stalls line the path. The environment shifts from open construction zone to a fortified, sheltering passage as the camera approaches the gate structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street under industrial overpass

events.description: passes under the Barghest gate into the enclosed settlement area beyond

agents.ego_description: passing through the Barghest gate and continuing into the covered market area beyond

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking deeper into the enclosed alley ahead

entered.detail: narrow covered pathway extending into the settlement with industrial walls on both sides
metal walkway or bridge structure spanning overhead between buildings

segments.scene_description: Passing under the heavy metal Barghest gate, the camera enters a narrow, covered market street enclosed by industrial ruins. The space is dimly lit with artificial lighting, featuring overhead walkways and makeshift structures. The environment feels fortified and enclosed, contrasting with the open construction zones outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sleek, elevated urban walkway into the claustrophobic depths of a fortified industrial settlement. It begins by gliding along wet asphalt past a curved glass building and palm trees, with a spherical stadium looming in the distance before the camera descends to street level. As the path turns left, the modern architecture gives way to a wide-open construction zone filled with dirt, debris, and towering cranes that dwarf the surrounding ruins. The scene then shifts into a muddy thoroughfare under industrial pipes, following a pedestrian toward a distant yellow gate while a flying vehicle passes overhead. Finally, the camera moves through an enclosed corridor of metal gantries and market stalls, passing under the heavy Barghest gate into a dimly lit, fortified street of industrial ruins.
